task_description: Add a basic Lambda function skeleton (SleepAudioProcessor) and integrate it into the Step Functions state machine as a Task/invocation step, following strict TDD with CDK assertions.

verification.summary: All 50 tests pass (40 existing + 10 new). cdk synth succeeds. Tests verify Lambda resource, runtime, handler, env vars, state machine integration, IAM permissions, error handling, and ordering.
